products.name: Inspection Drone E900
products.descriptor: industrial inspection drone for oil/gas, solar, pipeline, and power line applications

products.name: Inspection Drone C60
products.descriptor: autonomous inspection drone with 360° obstacle avoidance and AI edge computing

evidence.snippet: The M710 is customized for the C60 drone, integrating meteorological monitoring. It realizes functions like automatic takeoff, autonomous inspection, visually guided landing, automatic battery swapping, and rapid data reading. The fully automatic flight system, composed of the C60 drone and the M710 base station, can easily handle application scenarios such as all-day, high-frequency, and multi-task operations.

products.name: Fixed-Wing Drone SF120
